channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Green growth on pavement making it dangerous to walk on, 23rd March
item.description:
The green growth has increased during the recent months. Along 10 Red Cedard Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Cedars Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5 of the street lights are broken on meadow close, 23rd March
item.description:
This include 99, 100, 102 and others.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meadow Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Travellers parked on estate, 23rd March
item.description:
Travellers have set camp at the back of car park on meadow close.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meadow Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Piles of rubbish. By the way there is more rubbish by bin on Camberwell grove, 23rd March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped by bin and not collected

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grove Lane, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in council estate, 23rd March
item.description:
There is litter that has been left on floor 2 and floor 3 of this council estate. The fridge has been there for around a year.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lordship Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement obstruction, 23rd March
item.description:
Day and night blocked

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement requires litter to be picked, 23rd March
item.description:
Section of Love Walk between Denmark Hill and Jennie Lee House has lots of litter along it. Every day it’s getting worse.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Love Walk, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti needs removing here please, 23rd March
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sherman Road, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti needs removing from green utility box please, 23rd March
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sherman Road, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: 18 Kingdon Road, West Hampstead, 23rd March
item.description:
Neighbour blocking parking spaces with their bins, this road is for permit users not just for this particular house & is done on a daily basis.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingdon Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti needs removing please, 23rd March
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mitchell Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car park in the loading bay obstructing traffic turning left., 23rd March
item.description:
The bus could not go straight up, therefore had to go out to the adjacent lane to pass the car. This caused further obstruction as delayed the cars turning right.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Station Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on green utility box needs removing please, 23rd March
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mitchell Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neither lamp column at base of stairs working, 23rd March
item.description:
Neither lamp column at base of stairs is working and one is hanging down and completely broken

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked pavement, 23rd March
item.description:
This club the junction day and night take up the pavement where pedestrians have to go into the road so that they can have a queue or a smoking area not thinking about pushchairs or wheelchair users that have to go into the road which is dangerous

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Day 6 Now No Chute Blocked, 23rd March
item.description:
Day 6 Now Of Health & Safety For Block 1-66 Lincoln Court, Our Chute Is Completely Blocked Has Been Reported & Yet No One Has Arrived Today.. Job Number 10661816 This Is Really Bad On Hackney If A Fire Occurred..!!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bethune Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed frame dumped on pavement., 23rd March
item.description:
Bed frame dumped on pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glimpsing Green, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Section of Croftdown Road, 23rd March
item.description:
Sprayed parking signs
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croftdown Road, Dartmouth Park, Greater London

item.title: Tree soil dug up (again), 23rd March
item.description:
Same plot of soil has been dug up (presumably by the local foxes)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marlow Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken bin, 23rd March
item.description:
Broken bin has been left on pavement for over 6 months unclaimed. No property number on bin and hasn’t been used >6months as no wheels exist.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lassa Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
